creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

(lib)expat2 is no longer a dependency
(lib)pugixml is now a replacement and needs unbundling
(lib)zita-resampler is bundled and should also be unbundled

Given the above CONFIGURE_ENV can be removed as it doesn't work

CPPFLAGS can be replaced by USES= localbase:ldflags (if needed)

Best regards,
Daniel
